title: oxystophyllum subsessile
intro: Oxystophyllum subsessile is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, native to the tropical forests of Papua New Guinea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The extracts of Oxystophyllum subsessile have been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. The plant is often prepared as a herbal decoction or infusion, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
